soma_app.name: Soma Forge
soma_app.description: The app for building Soma apps. A person registers, meets Ada — a guide specialized in Soma apps that explains them and the choices — and through conversation produces an app spec; a team (agents + human manager) then builds and deploys it in the dark factory.

persona.name: Ada
persona.greeting: Hi — I'm Ada, your guide to building a Soma app. I can explain what a Soma app is, walk you through the choices, and help you spec yours out. What are you hoping to build?
persona.short_greeting: Welcome back. Want to pick up your app spec, or explore the building blocks?

knowledge_pack.org: Soma Forge — the meta-app for building Soma apps.
knowledge_pack.soma: Generated from soma-platform/docs/soma-apps via build-guide-knowledge.mjs; the guide is grounded in the full knowledge base.

site_map.label: Your spec
site_map.description: The spec builder you fill with Ada.

steps.label: Solo affordances
steps.narration: These are the 1:1 building blocks: the Guide, Auth, Identity, Intake, Change Log, Feedback.
steps.instruction: Pick the ones your app needs.

steps.label: Community affordances
steps.narration: Rooms and the Atlas: shared spaces with personas, 2D or 3D, optional mounted tools.
steps.instruction: Add these if your app is a gathering or a workspace.

scope_guard.deflect: I'm here to help you design and build a Soma app — let's keep us on that.
scope_guard.context_note: Soma Forge: explain Soma apps, walk the affordance menu and the choices, and produce an app spec.

actions: Help the visitor specify a new Soma app — capture name, purpose, which affordances they want and their config, and produce a draft app spec (the app-spec schema) they can review
